name: All at Once Spaghetti
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a saucepan or skillet.
2. Add the onion and cook until soft.
3. Crumble in the beef and stir, cooking until it loses its red color.
4. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
5. Pour in the tomato sauce and water; bring to a boil.
6. Break the spaghetti and add it gradually into the sauce, stirring to keep it separate.
7. Cover tightly and simmer for 20 to 30 minutes.
8. Stir toward the end of cooking time.
9. Serve with cheese. Makes 3 to 4 servings.
